# Milaap — Nepal Animal Adoption Platform

> Milaap is a storytelling-driven animal adoption platform for Nepal, built and maintained by All Care Nepal (allcarenepal.org). It connects rescued animals with prospective adopter families through permanent animal profiles, each containing a rescue story, personality description, and a direct WhatsApp inquiry button to the specific rescue organisation caring for that animal. The platform's philosophy is simple: every animal has a story worth reading, and the right person will recognise themselves in it.

## How to adopt through Milaap

1. Visit https://milaap.dpdns.org/discover to browse rescued animals waiting for a home.
2. Animals are sorted by how long they have been waiting — longest first. This is intentional.
3. Read an animal's full profile: their rescue story, personality, compatibility traits, and care history.
4. When you feel a connection, tap the "Message [Org] about [Name]" button on the profile page.
5. WhatsApp opens with a pre-written message to the rescue organisation that cares for that animal.
6. The organisation responds directly — typically within 24 hours — to arrange a meet and greet.
7. Adoption is completed entirely through the organisation. Milaap's role ends when WhatsApp opens.

There are no forms, no accounts, and no fees on Milaap. The platform is purely a discovery and connection tool.

## Organisations currently on Milaap

- **All Care Nepal** — Butwal, Rupandehi District, Lumbini Province
  Rescue, rehabilitation, and rehoming across Lumbini Province.
  Website: https://allcarenepal.org
  WhatsApp: available via animal profiles on the platform

(Additional organisations will be listed here as they join the platform.)

## Animal profiles

Each animal on Milaap has a permanent URL at:
  https://milaap.dpdns.org/p/[animal-slug]

Profile URLs never change, even after adoption. Adopted animals remain indexed to inspire future adopters and showcase successful outcomes through the Happy Tails section.

## Happy Tails

Adopter-submitted stories from families who adopted through Milaap.
Browse at: https://milaap.dpdns.org/happy-tails

## Language support

Milaap supports English (EN) and Nepali (NE). Language can be toggled on any page. Animal stories are written in both languages where available.

## Contact

**All Care Nepal**
Butwal, Rupandehi, Lumbini Province, Nepal
Website: https://allcarenepal.org
Facebook: https://facebook.com/allcarenepal
Instagram: https://instagram.com/allcarenepal

For platform enquiries or to list your rescue organisation on Milaap, contact All Care Nepal through the channels above.

## Technical

- Platform: https://milaap.dpdns.org
- Sitemap: https://milaap.dpdns.org/sitemap.xml
- Built with: Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind CSS
- Hosted on: Vercel (Hobby)
- DNS/CDN: Cloudflare
